name: translate
title: Translate
description: Translate, define, and speak text using the local translate CLI (multi-engine auto-fallback, offline dictionaries).
author: da-wei_lee

commands.name: translate
commands.title: Translate
commands.description: Translate text into a target language.

commands.name: translate-selection
commands.title: Translate Selection
commands.description: Translate the selected (or clipboard) text and paste the result.

preferences.name: binaryPath
preferences.title: translate binary path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the translate CLI. Empty = auto-probe ~/.local/bin, /opt/homebrew/bin, /usr/local/bin, ~/go/bin.

preferences.name: defaultTarget
preferences.title: Default target language
preferences.description: Language code used when none is picked (e.g. en, zh-TW, ja).

preferences.name: engine
preferences.title: Engine
preferences.description: Engine override: auto, google, dict, or a provider name. Empty = CLI default.

preferences.name: tier
preferences.title: Model tier
preferences.description: LLM model tier when an LLM engine is used.

preferences.name: liveDebounceMs
preferences.title: Live translate debounce (ms)
preferences.description: How long to wait after you stop typing before translating (min 250). Higher = fewer LLM calls while typing.
